creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Are you an art lover? You have to visit Jameel Arts Centre! It’s an open-access, free for all, contemporary art venue in Dubai.

What to expect: 
* Outdoor sculpture park
* Captivating modern artworks
* Landscaped gardens

🎟️ Free. Just register at the welcome desk.

🕙 Visiting Hours
Saturday – Thursday, 10:00am – 8:00pm⁠ Tuesday, closed⁠ Friday, 12:00pm – 8:00pm⁠

🍴Teible, a Michelin Guide restaurant, is located next door. So pop over for a great meal after visiting the art galleries.

📍 Jameel Arts Centre, Al Jaddaf Waterfront 

Save for your next Dubai trip.
